# C'est La Stay

> Beachfront villa retreat and wellness stay on the Bay of Bengal at Auroville,
> Tamil Nadu, India — minutes from Pondicherry on the Coromandel Coast.

## Key facts

- 14 private villas across 300 m of beachfront; nightly rates ₹6,500–₹22,000.
- Amenities: heated infinity pool, coastal spa and wellness treatments,
  ocean-to-table South Indian dining, palm garden and beachfront yoga deck.
- Multi-night wellness and stay packages from ₹16,900.
- Check-in from 14:00, check-out until 11:00, reception 24 hours.
- Address: 10, Auroville Rd, Edayanchavadi, Auroville, Tamil Nadu 605101, India.
- Contact: stay@cestlastay.com · +91 413 262 0000.
- Bookings: direct on the website (best-rate) via the Reserve section.

## Links

- Homepage: https://cestlastay.com/
